title: Graciassss
author: Xx
message: I thought I'm gonna be alone forever. Got depressed becAuse of the academic pressure. And can't connect cause of my introvert or inverted character 🤣. But your program made me to connect some friends 😭, and made me laugh even a bit, outside school. Such a huge thank you! Couldn't imagine how you manage your own studies at the same time organising these events, such a lovieeeee peps 😘
